Build your stockpile of Nerf Elite 2.0 blasters to optimize your game strategy and bring tactical performance and flexibility to every mission and battle! The Nerf Elite 2.0 Shockwave RD-15 blaster features customizing capabilities that include 3 tactical rails, barrel attachment point, and stock attachment point to optimize for battle. This pump-action blaster has a 15-dart rotating drum to swamp your targets. Pull the priming slide back and press the trigger to unleash 1 dart, or hold down the trigger and keep moving the slide to slam-fire all 15 darts. Includes 30 Official Nerf darts -- 15 for the drum, and 15 for reloads. Fires darts up to 90 ft (27 m). Eyewear recommended. Barrel extension, stock, and eyewear not included. No batteries required. With all those darts within reach, you have enough to fully load the drum and additional darts for reloads. Swamp the competition with pump action blasting. Load the drum, pump the priming slide backward and forward, and pull the trigger to launch a dart. This Nerf toy blaster has 3 tactical rails and attachments points for a stock and a barrel to customize with Nerf accessories (each sold separately, subject to availability). Designed for distance, the blaster fires darts up to 90 feet (27 meters). Nerf blasters for boys and girls are outdoor toys for kids to enjoy fun backyard games and make great gifts for kids. "desc": "

Nerf Elite 2.0 Shockwave RD-15 Blaster

Gear up for battle with Nerf Elite 2.0 blasters that feature built-in customizing capabilities so you can upgrade them and seize the advantage in Nerf competitions. Build your stockpile of Nerf Elite 2.0 blasters to optimize your game strategy and bring tactical performance and flexibility to every mission and battle!







The Nerf Elite 2.0 Shockwave RD-15 blaster features customizing capabilities that include 3 tactical rails, barrel attachment point, and stock attachment point to optimize for battle. This pump-action blaster has a 15-dart rotating drum to swamp your targets. Pull the priming slide back and press the trigger to unleash 1 dart, or hold down the trigger and keep moving the slide to slam-fire all 15 darts. Includes 30 Official Nerf darts -- 15 for the drum, and 15 for reloads. Fires darts up to 90 ft (27 m). Eyewear recommended. Barrel extension, stock, and eyewear not included. No batteries required.







Nerf and all related properties are trademarks of Hasbro.

[PRODUCT DESCRIPTION SHORT]

Fire 15 darts in row with the Nerf Elite 2.0 Shockwave RD-15 blaster that features a rotating, 15-dart drum! Blast into indoor and outdoor games with this Nerf kids blaster that includes 30 Nerf Elite foam darts. With all those darts within reach, you have enough to fully load the drum and additional darts for reloads. Swamp the competition with pump action blasting. Load the drum, pump the priming slide backward and forward, and pull the trigger to launch a dart. This Nerf toy blaster has 3 tactical rails and attachments points for a stock and a barrel to customize with Nerf accessories (each sold separately, subject to availability). Designed for distance, the blaster fires darts up to 90 feet (27 meters). Nerf blasters for boys and girls are outdoor toys for kids to enjoy fun backyard games and make great gifts for kids. Eyewear recommended (not included).

 

Nerf and all related properties are trademarks of Hasbro.

 

[PRODUCT INCLUDES LIST]

Includes: blaster, drum, 30 darts, and instructions.

 

Ages 8 and up

TO AVOID EYE INJURY:

WARNING: Do not aim at eyes or face. Use of eyewear recommended for players and people within range. Use only official Nerf darts. Other darts may not meet safety standards. Do not modify darts or blaster.

WARNING: CHOKING HAZARD - Small parts may be generated. Not for children under 3 years.

Some assembly required. No tools needed.

© 2022 Hasbro. All rights reserved.

The Nerf Elite 2.0 Echo CS-10 blaster includes a removable stock and removable barrel extension so you can customize the blaster multiple ways. Take advantage of 5 tactical rails to add other battle accessories (not included). The blaster has a 10-dart clip so you can fire a dozen darts in a row. Fire 1 dart at a time, or slam-fire all 10 darts rapidly from the pump-action blaster. Comes with 24 Official Nerf darts -- load 10 into the clip and keep the rest nearby for reloads. Blast all 10 darts in quick succession with slam fire action. The pump-action dart blaster includes a removable 10-dart clip and 24 Nerf Elite foam darts, so fill the clip and stash the rest for quick reloads. "desc": "

Nerf Elite 2.0 Echo CS-10 Blaster

Gear up for battle with Nerf Elite 2.0 blasters that feature built-in customizing capabilities so you can upgrade them and seize the advantage in Nerf competitions. Build your stockpile of Elite 2.0 blasters to optimize your game strategy and bring tactical performance and flexibility to every mission and battle!

The Nerf Elite 2.0 Echo CS-10 blaster includes a removable stock and removable barrel extension so you can customize the blaster multiple ways. Take advantage of 5 tactical rails to add other battle accessories (not included). The blaster has a 10-dart clip so you can fire a dozen darts in a row. Fire 1 dart at a time, or slam-fire all 10 darts rapidly from the pump-action blaster. Comes with 24 Official Nerf darts -- load 10 into the clip and keep the rest nearby for reloads. Fires darts up to 90 feet (27 meters). No batteries required. Eyewear recommended (not included).

Nerf and all related properties are trademarks of Hasbro.

[PRODUCT DESCRIPTION SHORT]

The Nerf Elite 2.0 Echo CS-10 blaster includes a removable stock and removable barrel so you can customize the Nerf blaster in outdoor play. The core blaster has a cool look on its own, then takes on a truly intimidating profile when you add the stock and barrel. Swamp opponents with foam frenzy as you fire 10 darts in a row. Blast all 10 darts in quick succession with slam fire action. The pump-action dart blaster includes a removable 10-dart clip and 24 Nerf Elite foam darts, so fill the clip and stash the rest for quick reloads. Gear up for battle with Nerf Elite 2.0 blasters that feature built-in customizing capabilities so you can upgrade them and seize the advantage in Nerf competitions. Build your stockpile of Nerf backyard toys 8 year old boys and girls and up and bring tactical performance and flexibility to every mission and battle! Toy foam blasters make excellent kids gifts. Eyewear recommended (not included). No batteries required.

NERF and HASBRO and all related trademarks and logos are trademarks of Hasbro, Inc.

[PRODUCT INCLUDES LIST]

Includes: blaster with removable stock, barrel extension, and 10-dart clip, 24 darts, and instructions.

Ages 8 and up

TO AVOID EYE INJURY:

WARNING: Do not aim at eyes or face. Use of eyewear recommended for players and people within range. Use only official Nerf darts. Other darts may not meet safety standards. Do not modify darts or blaster.

WARNING: CHOKING HAZARD - Small parts may be generated. Not for children under 3 years.

© 2025 Hasbro. All rights reserved.

REMOVABLE STOCK AND BARREL: Change the dart blaster as you play for a tactical advantage in Nerf outdoor game! The stock and barrel accessories are easy to attach and remove

 

[PRODUCT FEATURE 3]

REMOVABLE 10-DART CLIP: Keep the darts flying as you unleash 10 darts in a row with clip-fed blasting

 

[PRODUCT FEATURE 4]

INCLUDES 24 NERF ELITE FOAM DARTS: The Nerf blaster comes with enough darts to load the clip and additional darts for reloads

 

[PRODUCT FEATURE 5]

SLAM FIRE BLASTING: Unleash all 10 darts in a fast frenzy with slam fire action! Hold down the trigger and keep pumping the priming slide

 

[PRODUCT FEATURE 6]

NERF BLASTERS ARE GREAT GIFTS FOR KIDS: Nerf blasters are awesome outdoor toys for boys and girls ages 8 and up to enjoy fun, active play with friends and family (each sold separately, subject to availability)

EXPAND YOUR NERF BLASTER COLLECTION: Look for other Nerf blasters to build your collection to be ready with the perfect blaster for every game! (Blasters each sold separately, subject to availability.)

This Nerf dart blaster includes an attachable scope and attachable barrel so you can create different blaster styles as you gear up for Nerf games. Go lean and mean with the core blaster, add the scope to line up your targets, add the barrel for distance targeting -- you're ready for whatever the battle brings with the Eaglepoint RD-8 blaster. The revolving drum has an 8-dart capacity. Fire 8 darts in a row, then reload fast from the onboard dart storage that holds 8 darts. This Nerf Elite 2.0 blaster comes with 16 Official Nerf Elite darts -- 8 darts to load into the drum, and 8 darts to store on the blaster. Take aim and send the darts flying through the air up to 90 feet (27) meters. It has 3 tactical rails to add Nerf accessories (each sold separately, subject to availability). 标题: X-Shot Hyper Gel Clutch Blaster (5,000 Hyper Gel Pellets) by ZURU
详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "It's time to get hyped up with XSHOT Hyper Gel! The XSHOT Hyper Gel Clutch uses a manual slide to prime mechanism to blast Hyper Gel Pellets at 150 feet per second. The Clutch has a 100 Pellet capacity hopper, when you run out of Gel Pellets simply flip your blaster to reload from the 400 Pellet capacity mag. Stocked with 5,000 Hyper Gel Pellets and protective eyewear, just add water to start the ultimate Gel Blaster battle! Pack Inclusion 1x XSHOT Hyper Gel Clutch Blaster 5,000x Hyper Gel Pellets 1x Protective Eyewear Features(1) Get Hyped: The XSHOT Hyper Gel Clutch can blast Hyper Gel Pellets at 150 feet per second. Features (2) Manual Prime: The Clutch uses a manual slide to prime mechanism. No batteries needed! Features (3) 5,000 Hyper Gel Dehydrated Pellets: Just add water to hydrate the Hyper Gel Pellets. These Pellets are non-toxic, eco safe and don't stain. Features (4) 500 Hyper Gel Pellet Capacity: The Clutch blaster has a 100 Pellet capacity via its inner hopper, and an additional 400 Pellet capacity mag. Features (5) Protective Eyewear: XSHOT Hyper Gel blasters include protective eyewear. Warnings Choking hazard -Small pieces - Not for children under 3 years Recommended Age 14+ Battery Required? (Y/N) No Battery Included?(Y/N) No"}]

"desc": "

It's time to get hyped up with XSHOT Hyper Gel! The XSHOT Hyper Gel Clutch uses a manual slide to prime mechanism to blast Hyper Gel Pellets at 150 feet per second. The Clutch has a 100 Pellet capacity hopper, when you run out of Gel Pellets simply flip your blaster to reload from the 400 Pellet capacity mag. Stocked with 5,000 Hyper Gel Pellets and protective eyewear, just add water to start the ultimate Gel Blaster battle!

Pack Inclusion

1x XSHOT Hyper Gel Clutch Blaster 5,000x Hyper Gel Pellets 1x Protective Eyewear

Features(1)

Get Hyped: The XSHOT Hyper Gel Clutch can blast Hyper Gel Pellets at 150 feet per second.

Features (2)

Manual Prime: The Clutch uses a manual slide to prime mechanism. No batteries needed!

Features (3)

5,000 Hyper Gel Dehydrated Pellets: Just add water to hydrate the Hyper Gel Pellets. These Pellets are non-toxic, eco safe and don't stain.

Features (4)

500 Hyper Gel Pellet Capacity: The Clutch blaster has a 100 Pellet capacity via its inner hopper, and an additional 400 Pellet capacity mag.

Features (5)

Protective Eyewear: XSHOT Hyper Gel blasters include protective eyewear.

Warnings

Choking hazard -Small pieces - Not for children under 3 years

Recommended Age

14+

Battery Required? (Y/N)

No

Battery Included?(Y/N)

No

It's a great size for fast-moving outdoor games and easy to use, so kids, teens, and adults can all join in the fun. The Torrent is great way for everyone to get outside, get active, and get soaked! Tank capacity is 8 fluid ounces (236 milliliters). The Nerf Super Soaker brand has been pouring on the fun since 1989 and continues to drench everyone with water-blasting mayhem! Head outdoors for extreme soakage with Nerf Super Soaker blasters! Immerse the front of the blaster in water, and pull the plunger handle back to fill the tank. Soak your targets with a flooding blast of water from the Nerf Super Soaker Torrent water blaster! Storm into backyard battles with this Super Soaker blaster that's easy to fill and fun to fire. Put the front of the blaster in water and pull the plunger handle back to fill the tank, then push the handle forward to shower everyone with a flood of water. It's a great size for fast-moving outdoor games and easy to use, so kids, teens, and adults can all join in the fun. The Torrent is great way for everyone to get outside, get active, and get soaked! Tank capacity is 8 fluid ounces (236 milliliters). The Nerf Super Soaker brand has been pouring on the fun since 1989 and continues to drench everyone with water-blasting mayhem! Head outdoors for extreme soakage with Nerf Super Soaker blasters! Nerf Super Soaker and all related properties are trademarks of Hasbro.

•A FLOODING BLAST OF WATER: The Nerf Super Soaker Torrent water blaster unleashes a flooding blast of water from the blaster's barrel

•PLUNGER-FIRING ACTION: Take aim at your targets and push the plunger handle forward to shower them with a soaking blast

•EASY TO FILL: Easy to use! Immerse the front of the blaster in water, and pull the plunger handle back to fill the tank. Tank holds up to 8 fluid ounces (236 milliliters)

•Ages 6 and up

•CAUTION: Do not aim at eyes or face.

•WARNING: Small parts may be generated.

•Includes: 1 water blaster.

"desc": "

[PRODUCT FEATURES] REVOLUTIONARY NERF HYPER SYSTEM: Featuring Nerf Hyper rounds with an innovative design and material for unparalled performance to maximize capacity and speed PUMP-ACTION NERF HYPER RUSH-40 BLASTER: Pump the hopper to prime the blaster and press the trigger to fire at a velocity of up to 110 FPS (hand-powered priming -- no batteries required) 40 NERF HYPER ROUNDS AND LARGE HOPPER WITH 40-ROUND CAPACITY: Blaster comes with 30 Nerf Hyper rounds. Large, easy-load hopper can hold up to 40 rounds (additional rounds sold separately) TACTICAL RAILS FOR RELOAD CANISTERS: Attach Nerf Hyper round reload canisters to the tactical rails to refill the hopper fast (canisters and additional rounds each sold separately) [SHORT PRODUCT DESCRIPTION] Outblast and outlast with the revolutionary Nerf Hyper system! Nerf Hyper blasters feature extreme speed and keep you blasting with massive round capacity! Engineered for velocity, they fire rounds at up to 110 feet per second. They include large hoppers, so you spend more time playing and less time reloading. The rounds maximize speed and capacity with their innovative design and material. Round reload canisters attach to tactical rails for fast, easy reloads. Blasters and canisters each sold separately. The Nerf Hyper Rush-40 blaster includes 30 Nerf Hyper rounds and has large hopper with 40-round capacity. Load the hopper, move the priming slide backward and forward, and press the trigger to fire. Attach reload canisters to 2 tactical rails to keep backup firepower in reach. Includes trigger lock and ready indicator. Eyewear recommended (not included). Canisters and additional rounds each sold separately. Nerf and all related properties are trademarks of Hasbro. [PRODUCT INCLUDES LIST] Includes: blaster, 30 rounds, and instructions. [QA STATEMENTS] Ages 14 and up TO AVOID EYE INJURY: WARNING: Do not aim at eyes or face. Use of eyewear recommended for players and people within range. Use only official Hyper rounds. Other rounds may not be safe. Do not modify rounds or blaster. [LEGAL STATEMENTS] © 2020 Hasbro. All rights reserved.

Safe EPE pearl cotton soft gun body: Fully foam-wrapped, lightweight, painless on impact, and safe for young children to play without easily getting hurt.



Push-pull pump firing: Front and back pump handles absorb water and pressurize, enabling long-distance water spraying with one button. Easy to use, suitable for kids over 3 to handle independently.

"desc": "

[PRODUCT FEATURES]

[PRODUCT FEATURE 1]

NERF SUPER SOAKER TWIN TIDE WATER BLASTER: Pour on the fun with the Twin Tide water blaster that has twin barrels for a double blast of water

[PRODUCT FEATURE 2]

2-BARREL SOAKAGE: Make a splash in outdoor games and drench everyone with 2 streams of water with this double barrel Nerf Super Soaker water blaster

[PRODUCT FEATURE 3]

PUMP ACTION WATER BLASTING: Move the handle back and forth to send water streaming from the twin barrels on this fun water toy for kids

[PRODUCT FEATURE 4]

EASY TO FILL, EASY TO FIRE: Open the cap and fill the tank with water, close the cap, and pump the handle to treat everyone to a double blast of water

[PRODUCT FEATURE 5]

FUN OUTDOOR WATER TOY IS A GREAT GIFT FOR 6 YEAR OLD BOYS AND GIRLS: The Nerf Super Soaker Twin Tide water blaster is a cool toy for everyone to enjoy fun water battles

[PRODUCT DESCRIPTION SHORT]

Pour on the fun with the Nerf Super Soaker Twin Tide water blaster! The water blaster has 2 barrels so you can unleash 2 streams of water at once for double-barrel soakage. Easy pump action gets the fun going in outdoor games. Pump the handle backward and forward to send water spraying out of the blaster. To fill the Twin Tide water toy, lift the cap, fill the tank with water, close the cap, and start soaking! It's great for outdoor parties of all kinds, so bring it along to family get togethers, birthday bashes, or any time you want to deliver up some water-drenching fun. This Nerf Super Soaker water blaster is a great gift for 6 year old boys and girls to dive into lots of high energy play.

Nerf Super Soaker and all related properties are trademarks of Hasbro.

[PRODUCT INCLUDES LIST]

Includes: 1 water blaster.

Ages 6 and up

CAUTION: Do not aim at eyes or face.

WARNING: CHOKING HAZARD – Small parts may be generated. Not for children under 3 years.

© 2022 Hasbro. All rights reserved.

✅ Product Features:

  • 🧨 Includes Barrel Targets – Practice your aim and knock them down!
  • 🎯 Safe Soft Foam Bullets – Designed for fun, not pain

  • 🎮 Great for Indoor & Outdoor Play – Encourages physical activity
  • 🎁 Awesome Gift Idea – Ideal for birthdays, holidays, or rewards

📦 What’s in the Box?

  • 2 x Foam Bullet Blaster Gun
  • 5x–10x Soft Foam Bullets (depending on variant)
  • 3x–6x Stackable Barrel Targets

💡 Why Kids Love It:

Not just a toy gun – it’s a full shooting experience! The included barrel targets add extra excitement and help improve aim and focus. Made from safe, non-toxic plastic, this toy is built for endless fun and worry-free play.

🛒 Add to Cart Today & Turn Playtime into an Adventure!

[PRODUCT FEATURE 4]

EASY TO LOAD, PRIME, AND FIRE: Easy to use! Load 1 dart into the front of the barrel, pull down the priming handle, and press the trigger to fire the foam dart

[PRODUCT FEATURE 5]

FUN KIDS OUTDOOR TOYS: Nerf toys for boys and girls can be used for indoor or outdoor games for kids to enjoy with friends and family.

[PRODUCT FEATURE 6]

GREAT GIFTS FOR KIDS: Nerf blasters are awesome gifts for boys and girls!

Nerf Super Soaker Barrage

Your water-blasting games will take on a new dimension with the Super Soaker Barrage water blaster. This high-performance blaster offers you a variety of modes so you can choose the intensity and spray pattern of your water blasts. Out-soak the competition and determine your strategy as you unleash any of its 3 different modes. Just fill the tank with water, pump to fire, and lock in your mode with a quick turn of the nozzle.

 

Nerf, Super Soaker and all related terms are trademarks of Hasbro.

Three Modes: Awesome soaking power using 3 different modes

Vary Your Aim: Distance, Scatter and Flood modes offer an array of blasts

Soak up to 38 Feet (11.5 Meters) Away: Water blast your friends from up to 38 feet away

Holds 84 Fluid Ounces (1.2 Liters): Monster-size water holding capacity for major soakage

Includes: Super Soaker Barrage blaster

Ages 7 years and up

CAUTION: Do not aim at eyes or face

TO AVOID UNJURY: Use only clean tap water

© 2013 Hasbro. All Rights Reserved.

© 2013 Larami Ltd.

  • Licensed / Manufactured by: Hasbro
  • Brand: Nerf
  • Local Singapore Seller. 2-3 Days delivery.

PRODUCT DESCRIPTION:

They're the most accurate Nerf Rival blasters and the most accurate Nerf Rival rounds ever*! The blasters have an adjustable rear sight to customize the configuration for improved aim. The barrel is optimized with a streamlined design engineered for enhanced performance. The blasters include Nerf Rival Accu-Rounds, which have an improved aerodynamic design and dimple patten to provide more consistent flight.

PRODUCT FEATURES:

  • THE MOST ACCURATE NERF RIVAL SYSTEM: Nerf Rival blasters have an adjustable sight, optimized barrel, and Nerf Rival Accu-Rounds, making it the most accurate Nerf Rival system* for advanced precision.
  • NERF RIVAL FATE XXII-100 BLASTER: Breech-load, single-round blaster with priming t-bar, and trigger lock. Fires rounds at a velocity of 90 feet per second.
  • 3 NERF RIVAL ACCU-ROUNDS: The most accurate Nerf Rival rounds, with an improved aerodynamic design and dimple pattern to provide more consistent flight. Compatible with all Nerf Rival blasters.
  • ADJUSTABLE REAR SIGHT: The rear sight slides backward and forward, so you can customize it to improve the accuracy of your shot. Line up the rear sight with the front edge-glow sight for the perfect shot.
  • OPTIMIZED BARREL: The barrel is optimized with streamlined design that's engineered for enhanced performance.
  • Includes: blaster, 3 rounds, and instructions.

详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "Gear up for battle with Nerf Elite 2.0 blasters that feature built-in customizing capabilities so you can upgrade them and seize the advantage in Nerf competitions. Build your stockpile of Elite 2.0 blasters to optimize your game strategy and bring tactical performance and flexibility to every mission and battle! The Nerf Elite 2.0 Commander RD-6 blaster has 3 tactical rails, a barrel attachment point, and stock attachment point to customize the blaster for every Nerf game. The blaster has a 6-dart rotating drum so you can fire multiple darts before reloading. Fire 1 dart at a time, or launch all 6 darts rapidly with slam-fire action. Barrel extension and stock not included. includes 12 Official Nerf darts -- enough to fully load the drum, and 6 darts to keep nearby for reloads. Fires darts up to 90 feet (27 meters). Eyewear recommended (not included). No batteries required. includes 1 blaster 12 darts Item# 125385"}]
